guidelines: Cards should be self-contained units of content
Maintain consistent card sizing within the same grid
Include a clear visual hierarchy within the card
Make the entire card clickable when it leads to a detail view
colorGuidance: White or slightly elevated surface color
Subtle border or shadow for card separation
Category or status indicated with small colored badges
typographyGuidance: Card description: 14px, regular, muted, 2-3 lines max
commonMistakes: Inconsistent card heights in the same row
Too much content crammed into a small card
Missing hover or focus state for interactive cards
qualityChecklist: All cards in a row are the same height
Interactive cards have hover and focus states
